title: Boat Rental in Essaouira: Costs, Seasons and Best Boats for 2026
html:
Essaouira, on Morocco's Atlantic coast, offers excellent boating from the marina by the skala. Prices typically start around 150 EUR for a half-day motorboat charter. BoatHire24 connects you with verified boat options, whether you fancy a fishing trip or a relaxing cruise. This article helps you choose the best boat to charter in Essaouira.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Essaouira?

Prices range from 30 EUR for a shared tour to 1,500 EUR for a full-day crewed yacht. Shared boat trips (2, 3 hours) cost about 30, 50 EUR per person. Private half-day motorboat rentals start around 150 EUR. Catamaran full-day charters for up to 12 guests typically cost 600, 800 EUR. Luxury yachts like the Prestige 500 cost more, often from 1,200 EUR per day. You can compare verified boat listings on compare verified boat listings to see exact prices.

Which boat to rent in Essaouira?

  1. Open fishing boat, ideal for small groups of 4 to 6, from 150 EUR half-day.
  2. Motorboat (6, 8 m), perfect for coastal cruising and nearby anchorages, up to 8 guests, from 250 EUR half-day.
  3. Catamaran (10, 12 m), stable and spacious for 10, 12 guests on day trips, from 600 EUR full-day.
  4. Crewed luxury yacht (e.g. Prestige 500), premium experience for up to 10 guests, from 1,200 EUR full-day. For details on this motor yacht, visit its listing.
  5. Sailboat (9, 11 m), wind-powered option for 6, 8 guests, from 400 EUR half-day.

Where to set off in Essaouira

Most charters depart from Essaouira Marina, also known as Port de Plaisance. This well-sheltered harbour is near the old medina. Popular departure points include the main dock and the fishing port adjacent. From there you can head to the scenic Bay of Essaouira, the protected Île de Mogador nature reserve (about 4 nautical miles), or the small beach of Sidi Kaouki further south. Other common spots are the anchorage off Bordj el Berod and the coastal stretch towards Diabat.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Essaouira?

No, you can charter a boat with a licensed skipper without any licence of your own. If you wish to rent bareboat (without skipper), you may need a recognised boating licence; the operator confirms exact requirements. The high season runs from June to September, when the trade wind known as the Alizé provides consistent sailing conditions. One local tip:

In Essaouira, mornings are often calmer and clearer, so book an early start to avoid the afternoon breeze.

At a glance

  • Price band: 30, 1,500 EUR
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Capacity: 4, 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Essaouira

Can I take a boat in Essaouira without a skipper?

Some operators offer bareboat rentals to experienced skippers who hold a valid licence, but most visitors choose a skippered charter.

What is the best time of year to rent a boat in Essaouira?

The summer months from June to September offer the most reliable weather, with warm temperatures and steady wind ideal for sailing.

How long is the boat trip to Mogador Island?

The distance from Essaouira Marina to Mogador Island is about 4 nautical miles, taking roughly 30 minutes under power or longer by sail.

Are there boat rentals in Essaouira suitable for large groups?

Yes, catamarans and luxury yachts like the Prestige 500 can accommodate up to 12 guests, perfect for parties or family outings.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Essaouira and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
